nasb.text: It has been made a desolation, Desolate, it mourns before Me; The whole land has been made desolate, Because no man lays it to heart.

esv.text: They have made it a desolation; desolate, it mourns to me. The whole land is made desolate, but no man lays it to heart.

cnv.text: 他們使地荒涼， 在我面前一片荒涼悲哀； 全地荒涼， 卻無人關心。”

ccb.text: 他们使这片土地荒凉， 以致它在我面前哀哭。 遍地如此荒凉，却无人在意。
